reviews.comment:
Muy lleno durante el dia, especialmente los fines de semana. La cola puede parecer interminable. Es recomendable cargar combustible por la mañana temprano.

(Translated by Google)
Very busy during the day, especially on weekends. The queue can seem endless. It's advisable to fill up early in the morning.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer una parada, en mi caso de estar en silla de ruedas fueron muy solidarios para indicarme como ir a los sanitarios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop; in my case, being in a wheelchair, they were very helpful in directing me to the restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNnRhMFJREAE

reviews.comment: Convenient for travellers, it offers snacks and soft drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb1pUV2NREAE

reviews.comment:
Considerando la cantidad de turistas, tendrían que tener los baños abiertos las 24 hs. Podrían colocar duchas y cobrar un monto mínimo. La máquina de agua caliente usa monedas, tendría que usar fichas. Xq sino tenes moneda no podes comprar el agua y los que atienden, no te las facilitan.

(Translated by Google)
Considering the number of tourists, the restrooms should be open 24 hours a day. They could install showers and charge a minimal fee. The hot water machine uses coins; it should use tokens. Because if you don't have coins, you can't buy water, and the staff doesn't give them to you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMWVTb0lREAE

reviews.comment:
Esta en el centro de Villa la Angostura. Buena atención. Tienen wifi.

(Translated by Google)
It's in the center of Villa la Angostura. Good service. They have Wi-Fi.

reviews.comment:
Me cobraron el café carisimo, el salón no estaba limpio y se demoró  en cargar combustible y luego no habia lugar para estacionar para bajar al shop. Incomodo, igual bajamos y entramos al salon como describi al principio.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee was incredibly expensive, the lounge wasn't clean, and it took forever to refuel. Then there was nowhere to park to go down to the shop. Inconvenient, but we went down anyway and entered the lounge as I described at the beginning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbElEdk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Atención rápida y cordial en la carga de combustible, agradable cafetería, baños limpios. Poco espacio para estacionar en la zona de la playa de combustibles y no siempre tiene un surtido completo de lubricantes.

(Translated by Google)
Quick and friendly service at the pump, pleasant cafeteria, clean restrooms. Limited parking at the fuel station and lubricants are not always fully stocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOXIzNVhnEAE
